meaning: n.开拓地(尤指荷兰等国围海造的低田)
examples: The validity of this model is proved by a case study of a typical polder area in Datong lake.
This park breaks through the rigid polder-outline and forms a contrast with it's organic design.
Polder explains: "It could be a factory or a coal-fired power plant. We are still looking into it."
The Hedwige Polder has been in Gery De Cloedt's family for generations.
The "lie" Mr De Cloedt is referring to is the proposal to flood the Hedwige Polder to preserve it as a marshland for the birds.
